title: Minky Homecare Kitchen Compost Bin – Countertop Food Waste Caddy with Easy Wipe Clean Interior – Made in The UK, 0.9gal, Slate Blue
features: SUSTAINABLE FOOD WASTE SOLUTION – Composting organic waste creates soil nourishment that’s great for gardens, yards, and any type of plant life, all while reducing greenhouse gases. The integrated bag retention ring also allows for use with or without a liner.

PERFECT SIZE FOR FAMILIES - Space-efficient food waste recycling bucket offers 3.5L (0.9 gal.) of capacity, plenty for a day of family meals, but not too large to generate odors or attract pests before needing to be emptied.
STYLISH MODERN UK DESIGN – Available in 5 colors, this indoor counter compost bin features rounded corners and minimal attachment points for stress-free cleaning and sanitizing.

EASY TO USE – Stay-open lid and non-slip feet make using this kitchen waste bin easy and unobtrusive during busy meal prep times. Sturdy carry handle included for ease in transport and emptying. Bin does not have a latch closure.
3.5L (0.9 gal) Capacity. Designed and made in the UK.
description: Product Description Conveniently recycle your kitchen food waste with this handy, modern compost caddy! The Minky Compost Food Caddy is a space-efficient compost bin for storing/recycling food waste. The compact unit can be placed neatly under kitchen counters or on top of your work surface for ease of use while cooking. To prevent spills the caddy’s non-slip feet keep it sturdy on work tops. The internal retention ring can be used with or without biodegradable bags, simply wipe clean after emptying. The stay-open lid makes it easy to use when preparing your meals. The sturdy carry handle allows for food waste to be easily transported to larger outside bins once full. Premium quality, designed and manufactured in the UK and built to last. Safety Warning Always use gloves when handling food waste. Avoid composting sharp objects or hazardous materials. Keep the bin clean and dry to prevent pest attraction. Do not compost meat, fish, or dairy products.
